title: Fervse
content:
{{Top|leg}}
'''Fervse''', also known as '''[[Bothan/Legends|Bothan]] Glitterstone''', were a kind of gem created in the formation of the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Bothawui/Legends|Bothawui]].<ref name="EGPM">''[[The Essential Guide to Planets and Moons]]''</ref> 

Although ubiquitous on the planet, it was precious; important buildings, specifically clan homes and great halls contained much glitterstone, and the city of [[Drev'starn]] sparkled from glitterstone buildings.<ref name="EGPM" />

Glitterstone was used for jewelry and pieces of art. Blue or white flawless variants, with silvery specks, were also crafted for medallions, typically used for symbols of office or academia.<ref name="EGPM" />

Glitterstone and artifacts made of it, was much sought aroung [[The galaxy/Legends|the galaxy]], forming a flourishing industry for Bothan artisans, and a consistent export for the planet.<ref name="EGPM" />
{{Substance-stub}}
